questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
To what extent do you consider luxury chauffeur services (such as Blacklane) to be substitutes for premium ride-hailing services (such as Uber Black) (and vice versa)?
Do you think the Acquisition would have any impact on the competitive options for people who work as drivers or service providers for either Uber or Blacklane? If so, what kind of impact?
Do you think the Acquisition is likely to give Uber an opportunity to use its platform in a way that could harm competition in ride hailing services and/or competition in premium chauffeur services.?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Uber and/or Blacklane.
